positive: A highly stylized, symmetrical illustration of a celestial forest portal. The scene merges intricate botanical elements (ferns, stylized blooming flora) with cosmic geometry (crescent moons, constellations, orbiting planets). The composition must be central, clean, and perfectly balanced, suitable for a seamless apparel repeat. Use a limited, high-contrast color palette: deep indigo, muted teal, soft gold, and off-white. Style should be clean vector illustration mixed with modern graphic tattoo art. Flat color fields, strong outlines, graphic novel aesthetic, no gradients (or minimal use). Highly detailed, symmetrical, centered composition, high contrast, perfect for screen printing.
negative: blur, grainy, photorealistic, 3d render, watermarks, text, signature, logo, debris, dirt, artifacts, low contrast, noisy, bad anatomy, extra limbs, creepy, amateur, illegible
